lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jis no nadar kare tis guroo milaae |
lines.english: Those, upon whom He casts His Glance of Grace, come to meet the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਜੀਅ ਉਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh jeea upaae |
lines.english: He created the 8.4 million species of beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਕਾਟਿ ਸਦਾ ਜਨ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਸੁਹਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: kilabikh kaatt sadaa jan niramal dar sachai naam suhaavaniaa |6|
lines.english: Shedding their sins, His servants are forever pure; at the True Court, they are beautified by the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਖਾ ਮਾਗੈ ਤਾ ਕਿਨਿ ਦੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: lekhaa maagai taa kin deeai |
lines.english: When they are called to settle their accounts, who will answer then?

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਕਰੇ ਤੈ ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aap kare tai aap karaae |
lines.english: He Himself does, and He Himself causes all to be done.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਿ ਲਏ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: aape bakhas le prabh saachaa aape bakhas milaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: The True Lord God Himself forgives, and having forgiven, He unites them with Himself. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਫੁਨਿ ਦੂਐ ਤੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: sukh naahee fun dooai teeai |
lines.english: There shall be no peace then, from counting out by twos and threes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: poore gur kai sabad milaae |
lines.english: Through the Shabad, the Word of the Perfect Guru, He is met.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੨॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak naam milai vaddiaaee aape mel milaavaniaa |8|2|3|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Naam, greatness is obtained. He Himself unites in His Union. ||8||2||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਤਜਿ ਸਹਜ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਏਕੋ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: trisanaa taj sehaj sukh paaeaa eko man vasaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: Renouncing desire, I have found intuitive peace and poise; I have enshrined the One within my mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵੇਖਾ ਤਾ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਭਿੰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh vekhaa taa ihu man bhinaa |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, I see Him, and then this mind is pleased and uplifted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੋ ਆਪਿ ਫਿਰੈ ਪਰਛੰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: eiko aap firai parachhanaa |
lines.english: The One Lord Himself moves about imperceptibly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਇਕਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree ikas siau chit laavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who focus their consciousness on the One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਮਨੁ ਇਕਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਆਇਆ ਸਚੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰੰਗਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee man ikat ghar aaeaa sachai rang rangaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, my mind has come to its only home; it is imbued with the True Color of the Lord's Love. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਭੂਲਾ ਤੈਂ ਆਪਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: eihu jag bhoolaa tain aap bhulaaeaa |
lines.english: This world is deluded; You Yourself have deluded it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਫਿਰੈ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਭੂਲਾ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: anadin sadaa firai bhram bhoolaa bin naavai dukh paavaniaa |2|
lines.english: Night and day, it wanders around endlessly, deluded by doubt; without the Name, it suffers in pain. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਲੋਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: eik visaar doojai lobhaaeaa |
lines.english: Forgetting the One, it has become engrossed in duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਪਿ ਦੇਇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jis no aap dee vaddiaaee har kai naam samaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: Those, upon whom the Lord bestows greatness, are absorbed in the Name of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਕਰਮ ਬਿਧਾਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: jo rang raate karam bidhaate |
lines.english: Those who are attuned to the Love of the Lord, the Architect of Destiny

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਜੁਗ ਚਾਰੇ ਜਾਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa te jug chaare jaate |
lines.english: by serving the Guru, they are known throughout the four ages.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਚੇਤੈ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohi har chetai naahee |
lines.english: Being in love with Maya, they do not think of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਪੁਰਿ ਬਧਾ ਦੁਖ ਸਹਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jamapur badhaa dukh sahaahee |
lines.english: Bound and gagged in the City of Death, they suffer in terrible pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਨਾ ਬੋਲਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਦਰਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਪਾਪਿ ਪਚਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: anaa bolaa kichh nadar na aavai manamukh paap pachaavaniaa |4|
lines.english: Blind and deaf, they see nothing at all; the self-willed manmukhs rot away in sin. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਇ ਭਗਤਿ ਤੇਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bhaae bhagat terai man bhaae |
lines.english: Through loving devotional worship, they become pleasing to Your Mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਆਪਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: eik rang raate jo tudh aap liv laae |
lines.english: Those, whom You attach to Your Love, are attuned to Your Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਦਾ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo teree sadaa saranaaee |
lines.english: O Dear Lord, I seek Your Sanctuary forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਸਭ ਇਛਾ ਆਪਿ ਪੁਜਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: satigur sevan sadaa sukhadaataa sabh ichhaa aap pujaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: They serve the True Guru, the Giver of eternal peace, and all their desires are fulfilled. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਿਹਿ ਦੇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: aape bakhasihi de vaddiaaee |
lines.english: You Yourself forgive us, and bless us with Glorious Greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jamakaal tis nerr na aavai jo har har naam dhiaavaniaa |6|
lines.english: The Messenger of Death does not draw near those who meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੈ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਮੇਲੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: merai prabh mele mel milaae |
lines.english: My God merges with them, and unites them in Union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੇ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਸਚੁ ਬੁਝਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa sache teree saranaaee toon aape sach bujhaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: Forever and ever, O True Lord, I seek the Protection of Your Sanctuary; You Yourself inspire us to understand the Truth. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੇ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: anadin raate jo har bhaae |
lines.english: Night and day, they are attuned to His Love; they are pleasing to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਸਚੁ ਵਖਾਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: har gun gaaveh sach vakhaane |
lines.english: They sing the Lord's Glorious Praises, and speak the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਸਚੁ ਜਾਤਾ ਸੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: jin sach jaataa se sach samaane |
lines.english: Those who know the Truth are absorbed in Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਤਾੜੀ ਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੩॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate bairaagee nij ghar taarree laavaniaa |8|3|4|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are attuned to the Naam remain unattached and balanced; in the home of the inner self, they are absorbed in the primal trance of deep meditation. ||8||3||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਰੈ ਸੁ ਮੁਆ ਜਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: sabad marai su muaa jaapai |
lines.english: One who dies in the Word of the Shabad is truly dead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਚਾਪੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਸੰਤਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: kaal na chaapai dukh na santaapai |
lines.english: Death does not crush him, and pain does not afflict him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਤੀ ਵਿਚਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ਸੁਣਿ ਮਨ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jotee vich mil jot samaanee sun man sach samaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: His light merges and is absorbed into the Light, when he hears and merges in the Truth. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਨਾਇ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree har kai naae sobhaa paavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to the Lord's Name, which brings us to glory.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਚਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sev sach chit laaeaa guramatee sehaj samaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: One who serves the True Guru, and focuses his consciousness on Truth, following the Guru's Teachings, is absorbed in intuitive peace and poise. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਲਾਗੀ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: doojai laagee mehal na paae |
lines.english: Attached to duality, no one attains the Mansion of the Lord's Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਕਚੀ ਕਚਾ ਚੀਰੁ ਹੰਢਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa kachee kachaa cheer handtaae |
lines.english: This human body is transitory, and transitory are the garments it wears.
